what_it_does: This file is a metadata-only channel attachment record that links attachment id att-a328266f to a board item (board://item-c4997cbb) in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; the file body is empty.
target is expressed as a board:// URI pointing to item-c4997cbb.
added timestamp is an ISO 8601 value with timezone offset.
standouts: The attachment references an external board item via a board:// URI.
The file contains no payload or body beyond the YAML header.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
References external artifacts with a custom URI scheme (board://).
Records creation time with an ISO 8601 timestamp.
concerns: The attachment body is empty, so the actual content or reason for the attachment is not present.
The target board item is not described or resolvable from this file alone.
No author or editor field is recorded.
notes: A bare channel attachment stub that points to a board item but carries no content payload.
questions: What is the content or significance of board item item-c4997cbb?
Why does the attachment file have no body or payload?
Who created this attachment and in what channel message context?
What operations are valid for an attachment_type of board_items?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is a board_items attachment; actual content is only a metadata link with no board item data.
apparent_themes: Linking channel artifacts to board items via persistent references.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, referenceable association between a channel attachment and a specific board item, likely for later retrieval or cross-referencing.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item and the absence of any attachment body.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped association between a channel attachment identifier and a board item URI, preserving channel context and creation time for fusion.
summary_for_embedding: A metadata-only channel attachment record in the dragnet-development channel that links att-a328266f to board item board://item-c4997cbb with an ISO timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record and persist a reference from a channel attachment to a specific board item.
